departments.name: Product Management
departments.description: Product design, filing, pricing strategy, performance review.

processes.name: Product Design & Filing
processes.description: Concept → spec → state DOI filing for new insurance products.

processes.name: Pricing Strategy
processes.description: Per-segment pricing curves with explainable factor weights.

processes.name: Product Launch & Enablement
processes.description: Broker enablement, customer materials, KPIs go-live.

departments.name: Marketing
departments.description: Customer 360, segmentation, campaigns, content, social, reporting.

processes.name: Campaign Planning
processes.description: Audience segmentation + creative + channel mix optimisation.

departments.name: Sales & Distribution
departments.description: Quote-to-bind, broker enablement, conversational + voice + agentic.

processes.name: Lead Qualification
processes.description: Score inbound leads + route to best agent / channel.

departments.name: Underwriting
departments.description: Application triage, risk assessment, pricing, renewal underwriting.

subProcesses.name: Document ingest
subProcesses.description: OCR + entity extraction from broker submissions.

processes.name: Risk Assessment
processes.description: Risk score + tier + explainability + fairness check.

departments.name: Policy Administration
departments.description: Policy lifecycle — issue, endorsements, renewals, cancellations.

processes.name: Policy Issuance
processes.description: Generate policy docs + welcome pack + first-bill.

departments.name: Billing & Collections
departments.description: Premium billing, payment, collections, reconciliation.

processes.name: Payment Processing
processes.description: Card + ACH + check intake + fraud screen.

departments.name: Claims
departments.description: FNOL → investigation → settlement → recovery, multi-modal AI-heavy.

processes.name: FNOL Intake
processes.description: First notice of loss across voice / portal / broker / mobile.

subProcesses.name: Voice-channel FNOL
subProcesses.description: Voice agent intake with transcript + summary.

subProcesses.name: Portal FNOL
subProcesses.description: Self-service portal with photo / doc upload.

processes.name: Investigation
processes.description: Damage assessment via vision + interviews + docs.

departments.name: Special Investigation Unit
departments.description: Fraud detection, investigation, behavioural + network analytics.

processes.name: Fraud Detection
processes.description: Continuous scoring across claims + payments + identities.

departments.name: Customer Service
departments.description: Voice + chat + agent assist + sentiment + quality monitoring.

processes.name: Complaint Resolution
processes.description: Complaint triage + escalation + root cause + close-loop.

departments.name: Actuarial
departments.description: Pricing, reserving, forecasting, scenario + simulation.

departments.name: Reinsurance
departments.description: Treaty + facultative placement, exposure, cession accounting.

processes.name: Facultative Placement
processes.description: Per-risk reinsurance for large or unusual risks.

departments.name: Compliance
departments.description: Regulatory tracking, filings, audit response, responsible AI.

processes.name: Filing Management
processes.description: State DOI + NAIC + EU filings + tracking.

departments.name: Legal
departments.description: Contracts, litigation, regulatory liaison, document AI.

departments.name: Finance
departments.description: Premium accounting, loss reserves, financial reporting, FinOps.

departments.name: Enterprise Risk Management
departments.description: Enterprise risks: operational, credit, market, cat, climate, ESG.

departments.name: Human Resources
departments.description: Talent, learning, workforce, coaching, meeting AI.

departments.name: Procurement & Vendor Mgmt
departments.description: Sourcing, vendor performance, contract risk, compliance.

departments.name: Data & Analytics
departments.description: Data quality, governance, master data, reporting.

departments.name: AI / Data Science
departments.description: Predictive, generative, agentic, multi-agent, RL, MLOps.

departments.name: IT Operations
departments.description: AIOps, incident, observability, performance, capacity, FinOps.

departments.name: Cybersecurity

departments.description: AI policy + risk + evaluation + responsible + ethical.
